findings.title: Ralph loop agent harness
findings.why: What MCP servers, IDE configs, or CLI workflows have reproducible setup guides?
how_to_steps: Open the source: https://github.com/vercel-labs/ralph-loop-agent
Skim for prerequisites and install commands
Apply the workflow on a small branch before team rollout
Measure cycle time or defect rate for one week
findings.evidence: repo or docs with setup steps
